title: Jabran Rafique
intro: Senior Tech Lead / Staff Engineer with over a decade of experience designing and delivering large-scale, high-availability platforms across global consumer products. Proven track record in shaping technical direction, driving end-to-end solution architecture, and guiding cross-functional engineering teams to deliver high-quality software at scale. Deep expertise spanning distributed Backend systems, event-driven architectures, Salesforce platform engineering, and modern Frontend platforms, developer productivity, and engineering excellence. Experienced in mentoring engineers at all levels, building communities of practice, and translating technical strategy into measurable business outcomes.

employments.intro: Manage Sky's online portfolio across US, Europe and Africa. Lead AI automation, TDD/DX initiatives and high-stakes technical decisions via cross-functional stakeholder collaboration.
experience: Engineered and delivered enterprise-wide AI automation infrastructure using Augment/Auggie and GitHub Copilot - creating reusable GitHub Actions workflows with AI agent prompts, enhancing developer productivity and reducing time to market.

Architected automated documentation generation pipeline running weekly via GitHub Actions, automatically analysing codebases and generating/updating markdown files with Augment AI agents - reducing documentation maintenance overhead by 75%.

Contributed to interactive AI development workflows enabling teams to trigger AI-assisted code analysis, implementation planning and automated PR generation via GitHub issue comments, streamlining cycles for distributed teams.
Architected automation of the Akamai Property Manager rules order key, eliminating 100% of manual effort and enhancing CDN configuration efficiency and developer experience.

Contributed to tailored AI-powered PR review system using Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Haiku 4.5 with custom prompt engineering, providing automated code quality feedback with configurable severity levels and confidence scoring.

Implemented rigorous performance monitoring using Lighthouse CI, Catchpoint and Elastic APM Watchers; GraphQL schema validation in Concourse CI/CD workflows to continually evaluate bottlenecks across global markets.
Led initiative to improve performance of the performance CI pipeline with refactored authentication flow - especially helping pull request pipelines with improved stability and speed.

Contributed to Next.js 15+ applications using React, TypeScript, Apollo Client for GraphQL, Playwright, Cypress and Vitest — serving millions of users across Peacock, NOW TV and Sky streaming platforms.
Led initiatives to the shared UI components library to align implementations with Sky design system, enhancing consistency and reusability across multiple web applications.
Led knowledge-sharing sessions and code reviews promoting best practices; mentored engineers with at least 2 promoted to senior roles.

employments.intro: Led technical direction across frontend and backend teams, driving platform modernisation, QA automation, and cloud infrastructure strategy.
experience: Guided strategic planning and technical direction, aligning engineering efforts with long-term business goals and market trends.

Spearheaded technical direction and code review guidance to frontend and backend teams working in Java and Spring Boot, helping accelerate delivery and maintain architectural quality — including support with the platform's migration to Java 9.
Leveraged Lighthouse/WebPageTest, Remix, Cloudflare Workers and PWA for 55% platform speed increase.
Led end-to-end test automation strategy using Selenium, Ruby and Cucumber (BDD), integrated directly into CI/CD workflows to enforce quality gates across the delivery pipeline.

Spearheaded containerised development environments using Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform and AWS CloudFormation — enabling isolated, reproducible workflows with multiple backend microservices and frontend micro-frontends running simultaneously for distributed teams.

Contributed to delivering a B2B event-driven solution in Node.js, Redis and RabbitMQ handling schedule-based, constraint and budget-driven customer workflows for dynamic job purchasing, enabling reliable async processing for business-critical operations.
Cultivated a culture of continuous learning and technical excellence through mentorship; actively involved in senior recruitment to build a high-performing engineering team.

employments.intro: Built and scaled core platform services; led frontend architecture, event-driven backend integrations and cross-functional technical direction.
experience: Built Node/Redis BFF service for user authentication handling 500k+ daily requests as a proxy to Java microservices, backed by DynamoDB, MongoDB, RDS, Elasticsearch and served through Apache, AWS and Cloudflare; designed for high-throughput, low-latency performance.

Directed Salesforce Lightning and Apex development for Sales, Customer Success and Marketing custom flows, collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders to deliver scalable CRM automation aligned with business operations.
Provided technical direction and code review to backend Java/Spring Boot teams, ensuring quality and architectural coherence across service boundaries.
Led migration of legacy PHP and JSP stack to a modern React/NodeJS architecture (strangler-fig pattern) using Remix and Cloudflare Workers, VWO and SEOClarity for A/B testing and SEO gains.
Managed CI/CD pipelines using BitBucket, Bamboo, AWS and Cloudflare; championed PWA technologies, substantially increasing mobile engagement metrics.
Implemented comprehensive monitoring with AWS CloudWatch, AppDynamics, Heap and Site24x7; mentored frontend engineers and shaped team composition through active recruitment.

employments.intro: Contributed to platform migration, rebranding and toolchain modernisation within an agile team.
experience: Helped transition frontend stack to AWS to enhance performance; adopted Docker for scalable deployments behind Apache web server.
Spearheaded custom signup and automated vetting application using LAMP stack and Symfony2.
Participated in platform rebranding (2016), improving user engagement; modernised frontend toolchain to boost developer experience.

employments.intro: Led development team across client projects; owned technical roadmap, mentoring and delivery standards.
experience: Oversaw social apps and websites development, mentored the development team and maintained technical roadmap for high-profile clients.
Pioneered MVC frameworks for custom web applications; enforced rigorous code quality and documentation standards across diverse client projects.
Spearheaded adoption of cutting-edge technologies, guiding the team on industry trends and elevating technical capabilities.

Developed and maintained in-house social media MVC application frameworks, significantly improving performance and user engagement for client platforms while enhancing code reusability and streamlining development processes.
Mentored junior developers and freelancers, fostering a culture of knowledge sharing and driving team productivity in agile development sprints.

freelancing.description: I developed a Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) platform in LAM(PHP) stack to monitor countrywide fibre-optic operations internally. The monitoring platform extensively used Google Maps API underneath with drawings API on top of it to add lines and station data to showcase service status in real-time. The source of data was the emails generated by the stations on service updates.
I developed the website, designed branding and an internal logistics consignment system using LAM(PHP) stack that had helped me learn advance aspects of web development.

I designed the wireframes and prototypes. Based on these designs, I developed the website and inventory UI for electro-mechanical material related to the aerospace industry using open-source technologies LAM(PHP).

projects.description: I develop apps based on personal ideas and interests in my spare time.

data.description: A directory of businesses accepting childcare vouchers as payment.

data.description: Directory of organizations helping during the COVID-19 pandemic.

data.name: Covid19 Today
data.description: Daily updated figures for COVID-19 for every country and continent.

data.name: Socialmedia.js
data.description: A JavaScript library that simplifies the social media integration into the web apps. It has a comprehensive documentation covering setup and usage for various supportive social media platforms.

data.name: Fetchwitter
data.description: An easy-to-use PHP client to authenticate and consume Twitter API in web apps. Fetchwitter exposes a small and simple API to fetch Tweets and perform searches with terms such as a hashtag. It also has a WordPress plugin for easy integration into WordPress.

data.name: CSV Parser
data.description: A PHP client to parse CSV data from a file, stream, or string and convert into indexed or associative array format.

data.name: JS Memcache
data.description: A lightweight JavaScript in-memory cache to store data for better performance by saving on network requests.

volunteering.intro: Regional Community Lead & Moderator, Google Map Maker (2008-2013) — Guided a global mapper community, set regional standards, organised events and led training sessions. Featured on Google LatLng Blog.
